meaning: vi.(声音等)减弱下去,褪色,消失,枯萎,凋谢vt.使褪色n.淡入,淡出adj.乏味的,平淡的
examples: The colour in this material does not fade.
Further, natural dyes tended to be muddy in hue and fade quickly.
My resentment of her slowly began to fade.
As the realtors and bank employees fade from importance, the technorati will take their places.
The bad memories are beginning to fade and people are willing to venture out.
